classes.name: Usuario
classes.notes: Implements UserDetails for Spring Security. Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: Passageiro
classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: Marinheiro
classes.notes: Contains inner enum StatusAprovacao (PENDENTE, APROVADO, REJEITADO). Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: Viagem
classes.notes: Contains inner enums StatusViagem (PENDENTE, AGUARDANDO_APROVACAO_PASSAGEIRO, ACEITA, EM_ANDAMENTO, CONCLUIDA, CANCELADA) and MetodoPagamento (DINHEIRO, PIX). Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: Avaliacao
classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: ViagemRecusada
classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString.

classes.name: LoginResponse
classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString.

classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString.

classes.notes: Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

classes.name: PaginatedResponse
classes.notes: Generic DTO for paginated responses. Lombok generates getters, setters, equals, hashCode, toString, constructors.

relationships.description: One-to-one relationship: each Passageiro has one Usuario
One-to-one relationship: each Marinheiro has one Usuario
Many-to-one relationship: many Viagens belong to one Passageiro
Many-to-one relationship: many Viagens can belong to one Marinheiro (nullable)
Many-to-one relationship: many Avaliacoes belong to one Viagem
Many-to-one relationship: many Avaliacoes have one avaliador Usuario
Many-to-one relationship: many Avaliacoes have one avaliado Usuario
Many-to-one relationship: many ViagemRecusadas belong to one Viagem
Many-to-one relationship: many ViagemRecusadas belong to one Marinheiro
Usuario implements UserDetails interface for Spring Security
